## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress on content marketing efforts and potential career moves](https://fathom.video/share/9xw5tSkWGuVz58A8cay8BZUiMVDpLofC?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel faced challenges with a co-founder leaving his startup abruptly](https://fathom.video/share/9xw5tSkWGuVz58A8cay8BZUiMVDpLofC?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Hank is considering full-time job offers from two companies after facing setbacks with his own venture](https://fathom.video/share/9xw5tSkWGuVz58A8cay8BZUiMVDpLofC?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Content marketing efforts are showing positive signals like increasing impressions and SERP rankings](https://fathom.video/share/9xw5tSkWGuVz58A8cay8BZUiMVDpLofC?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [Need to get more aggressive with content publishing and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/9xw5tSkWGuVz58A8cay8BZUiMVDpLofC?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's Startup Challenges

  - [Co-founder/friend ended their engagement abruptly, leading to a pivot](https://fathom.video/share/9xw5tSkWGuVz58A8cay8BZUiMVDpLofC?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [Despite the setback, Marcel's agency gained interest from multiple departments at a company after a presentation](https://fathom.video/share/9xw5tSkWGuVz58A8cay8BZUiMVDpLofC?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Highlights the ups and downs of entrepreneurship](https://fathom.video/share/9xw5tSkWGuVz58A8cay8BZUiMVDpLofC?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)

### Hank's Potential Career Move

  - [Two companies are interested in hiring Hank full-time](https://fathom.video/share/9xw5tSkWGuVz58A8cay8BZUiMVDpLofC?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [One had previously passed on him but now wants him back, even fractionally](https://fathom.video/share/9xw5tSkWGuVz58A8cay8BZUiMVDpLofC?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [The other company is further along in growth and revenue](https://fathom.video/share/9xw5tSkWGuVz58A8cay8BZUiMVDpLofC?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Hank is weighing equity, salary, and growth potential as he negotiates offers](https://fathom.video/share/9xw5tSkWGuVz58A8cay8BZUiMVDpLofC?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)

### Content Marketing Progress

  - [Overall impressions, SERP rankings, and number of ranked keywords are increasing](https://fathom.video/share/9xw5tSkWGuVz58A8cay8BZUiMVDpLofC?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
  - [A small dip in keywords ranked 50-100 needs investigation](https://fathom.video/share/9xw5tSkWGuVz58A8cay8BZUiMVDpLofC?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
  - [Performing well for the early stage, but need to get more aggressive](https://fathom.video/share/9xw5tSkWGuVz58A8cay8BZUiMVDpLofC?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)

### Web Strategy Discussion

  - [Hank wants to start migration to Lightbox but is waiting for input from Ryan](https://fathom.video/share/9xw5tSkWGuVz58A8cay8BZUiMVDpLofC?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Doesn't want to bring in an agency and start migration before getting Ryan's thoughts](https://fathom.video/share/9xw5tSkWGuVz58A8cay8BZUiMVDpLofC?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
  - [(This part was requested to be kept confidential)](https://fathom.video/share/9xw5tSkWGuVz58A8cay8BZUiMVDpLofC?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to dig into the dip in 50-100 ranked keywords](https://fathom.video/share/9xw5tSkWGuVz58A8cay8BZUiMVDpLofC?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
  - [Hank to share offer details with Marcel once received for advice](https://fathom.video/share/9xw5tSkWGuVz58A8cay8BZUiMVDpLofC?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Prioritize getting more aggressive with content publishing](https://fathom.video/share/9xw5tSkWGuVz58A8cay8BZUiMVDpLofC?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
  - [Wait for Ryan's input before starting migration to Lightbox](https://fathom.video/share/9xw5tSkWGuVz58A8cay8BZUiMVDpLofC?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
